hero.subtitle: NUTRITIONIST BIOLOGIST
hero.title: REAL FOOD. REAL BALANCE.
hero.description: I help people create healthy, sustainable eating habits that fit their lifestyle — without stress, guilt, or extreme diets.

one.title: Knowledge
one.description: Knowledge and awareness of your body and mind in relation to food

two.title: Methods
two.description: Methods, strategies and training to achieve self-knowledge and personalized pathways

three.title: Movement
three.description: Physical activity and sports to establish a physical and mental connection for external and internal well-being

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: Dr. Felaco
about.text1: nutritionist biologist, curious researcher in food and nature.
about.text2: I teach support in a middle school, passionate about educational and didactic methods.
about.text3: I provide methodological tools with love and pleasure to help growth with simplicity and serenity.
about.text4: My modus operandi is to help people build their psycho-physical well-being through prevention and education.
about.quote1: Health comes from knowledge and wisdom comes from external guidance.
about.quote2: We are what we eat, say and do!

whatWeDo.label: OUR SERVICES
whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: We offer specialized medical nutrition therapy for a wide range of health conditions, with a personalized, evidence-based approach.
whatWeDo.cta: Each nutrition plan is tailored to your specific needs and health conditions.

overweight.title: Overweight and Obesity
overweight.description: Personalized weight management programs with sustainable approach and continuous support.

eatingDisorders.title: Eating Disorders
eatingDisorders.description: Specialized nutritional support for anorexia, bulimia, and other eating disorders.

diabetes.title: Diabetes
diabetes.description: Medical nutrition therapy for type 1 and type 2 diabetes management.

metabolic.title: Metabolic Syndrome
metabolic.description: Targeted meal plans to improve metabolic parameters and prevent complications.

hypertension.title: Hypertension and Heart Diseases
hypertension.description: Therapeutic diets for blood pressure control and heart health.

renal.title: Renal Insufficiency
renal.description: Specialized clinical nutrition to support kidney function.

childhoodObesity.title: Childhood Obesity
childhoodObesity.description: Dedicated nutrition programs for children and adolescents with family-based approach.

autoimmune.title: Fibromyalgia and Autoimmune Diseases
autoimmune.description: Anti-inflammatory nutritional strategies to manage symptoms and improve quality of life.

intolerances.title: Food Intolerances and Allergies
intolerances.description: Identification and management of food intolerances with balanced dietary plans.

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy and Breastfeeding
pregnancy.description: Complete nutritional support for expectant mothers and during breastfeeding.

menopause.title: Menopause
menopause.description: Targeted nutrition to manage menopause symptoms and promote hormonal well-being.

oncological.title: Oncological Nutrition
oncological.description: Specialized nutritional support during and after cancer treatment.

sports.title: Sports Nutrition
sports.description: Optimized meal plans for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

vegetarian.title: Vegetarian and Vegan Nutrition
vegetarian.description: Complete and balanced nutrition plans for plant-based diets.
